title: acalypha communis var. hirta
intro: Acalypha communis var. hirta, also known as the Rough-leaved Acalypha, is a plant species in the family Euphorbiaceae. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Acalypha communis var. hirta include treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues like bronchitis. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves are often used to make infusions, teas, and tinctures, which are taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
